【悬疑+推理+破案+烧脑+反转+单元剧，主要以推理破案为主，有点变态】
四名超级警察，组成重案组，从全国各地挑选而来，对各地特大凶案进行侦破。
你见过生有两副生殖器官的人吗？
你见过种在花瓶里的姑娘吗？
你见过产人奶的奶牛场吗？
你是否见过真正的秀色可餐？
你是否有过这样的经历？你一个人走在下雨的黑夜，一个红衣男孩淋着雨在雨中唱儿歌。
善与恶的较量，正义与罪恶的审判，我们将付出多么大的代价？
千里追凶，上善伐恶，直击罪恶心理！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6b9db3b090935fc5d6d662189efe57b0","author":"发癫的狼","author_id":"","book_id":"7550309258563161113","book_name":"十宗罪：全员恶人","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#100808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7550309627263468057","read_count":"19359","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"615053"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.9","serial_count":"291","tags":"悬疑灵异,悬疑,推理,破案","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/aaf7f6abc716ccce15098dbebc1304e3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779254601&x-signature=3NXYsZA9TEgxVPMqR1zx5u4n4so%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2927340168426139","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"35"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321132321476F6A82C314FBAE3214"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":9440,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9949,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":8917},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1761127080,"author_reply_time":1761128446,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_typ
